prompt: Full-body cinematic portrait of a confident male rider leaning against a matte black custom bobber motorcycle in front of a tall dark metal paneled wall, composition slightly left of center with negative space to the right, three-quarter view of the bike. He wears a fitted black leather jacket with two narrow beige racing stripes on the left shoulder and chest, black leather gloves, slim distressed dark jeans with a knee rip, and worn brown leather boots. He holds a matte black half-helmet with thin gold stripes at his side, right arm casually resting on the bike’s handlebars, legs crossed at the ankles, neutral stern expression, short neat hair and trimmed stubble. Dramatic soft directional side lighting with subtle rim light to emphasize metal and leather textures, high contrast, muted desaturated color palette with warm accents on stripes and boots, shallow depth of field, fine film grain, high clarity and detail on engine chrome, tires and stitching, editorial fashion/biker magazine mood, low camera angle, modern urban industrial aesthetic.
